channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Small Texas town challenges Trump's border wall plan from the Mexican border to Washington
item.description: A tiny Texas town is opposing the Trump administration's border wall plans, citing potential flooding and legal shortcuts.

item.title: Trump threatens to bomb a bridge or power plant for each ship Iran attacks
item.description: The Pentagon insists the Strait of Hormuz is open, but ongoing Iranian attacks lead a shipping insider to say 'nothing is going through.'

item.title: Should you lock a mortgage rate before the July Fed meeting? Pros and cons to weigh now
item.description: There are significant pros and cons to locking a mortgage interest rate now. Here are four factors to consider.

item.title: Beaches closed and sandbags filled as Tropical Storm Bertha nears the Gulf Coast
